name: ltm
description: Token-first, cross-project long-term memory for Claude Code. Captures sessions off the interactive path, distils atomic facts, embeds them compactly, and injects relevant memory just-in-time via hooks. Local-first — no API key, no network.

embedding.title: Embedding backend
embedding.description: hash = dependency-free lexical stub (zero installs); fastembed = real semantic model. On first use, fastembed self-provisions a private venv under the plugin data dir — no manual pip needed.

embedding_model.title: Embedding model (fastembed)
embedding_model.description: fastembed model id. Blank uses BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5 (best measured recall). BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 is lighter/faster.

python.title: Pinned interpreter (advanced)
python.description: Absolute path to a Python with fastembed, used for all hooks. Leave blank to use the auto-provisioned managed venv.

distiller.title: Distiller
distiller.description: claude = headless claude -p (defaults to Haiku — best-quality outcome facts, costs a little); ollama = local OpenAI-compatible server (zero tokens, offline); heuristic = dependency-free line extraction (no LLM). claude/ollama fall back to heuristic on any failure, so capture never breaks.

distiller_model.title: Distiller model
distiller_model.description: For claude: model alias/id (blank = haiku). For ollama: model name (blank = qwen2.5:3b).

distiller_base_url.title: Distiller base URL (ollama/http)
distiller_base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for the ollama/http distiller. Default is a local Ollama server.

ttl_days.title: Memory TTL (days)
ttl_days.description: Archive facts unseen for this many days on capture. 0 disables hard expiry (recency decay still de-ranks old facts).

ttl_keep_frequency.title: TTL keep-frequency
ttl_keep_frequency.description: Facts reinforced at least this many times are never expired by the TTL sweep.

top_k.title: Recall results per prompt
top_k.description: Max facts injected just-in-time on each prompt.

min_sim.title: Similarity threshold
min_sim.description: Minimum cosine similarity for a fact to be injected. Higher = stricter (fewer, more relevant).

core_size.title: Session core size
core_size.description: Facts injected once at session start (cache-friendly). Set 0 to disable.

max_chars.title: Max injected characters
max_chars.description: Hard cap on characters injected per hook — the token budget guard.

cross_project.title: Cross-project fallback
cross_project.description: If in-project recall is weak, fall back to other projects' memory (slightly penalised).

half_life_days.title: Recency half-life (days)
half_life_days.description: A memory's recency weight halves every this-many days unless reinforced. Lower = forgets faster.

supersede_threshold.title: Supersession similarity
supersede_threshold.description: A new fact this similar (cosine) to an older one archives the older (newest wins). 1.0 disables. Keep high to avoid retiring distinct facts.

recall_min_confidence.title: Recall confidence gate
recall_min_confidence.description: The `recall` MCP tool returns verdict=ok only when calibrated confidence reaches this; below it the verdict is low_confidence (treat facts as hints, widen the search). Higher = stricter.

recall_max_chars.title: Recall response budget (chars)
recall_max_chars.description: Character budget for facts returned by the on-demand `recall` MCP tool — highest-scoring facts are packed until it is spent.

viewer_autostart.title: Auto-start memory viewer
viewer_autostart.description: Start the localhost memory viewer as a detached background process on session start. It stays up across sessions (only one instance runs) and streams live updates. Disable to start it manually with /memory-viewer.

viewer_port.title: Memory viewer port
viewer_port.description: Localhost port for the always-on memory viewer.

promote_after_freq.title: STM→LTM promote-after frequency
promote_after_freq.description: Reinforcement count at which a fresh short-term fact is promoted to the long-term store (rehearsal).

stm_capacity.title: Short-term capacity
stm_capacity.description: Max active short-term facts before the weakest are displaced (archived). 0 = unbounded (displacement off).

stm_recall_weight.title: STM recall weight
stm_recall_weight.description: Recall weight applied to short-term facts. 1.0 = tier-agnostic (default); below 1.0 down-ranks STM at recall.

retention_keep_max.title: Retention keep-max (prune)
retention_keep_max.description: Consolidation keeps only the top-N active facts by retention score and prunes the rest. 0 = disabled. Retrieval-affecting — enable deliberately.

prune_threshold.title: Retention prune threshold
prune_threshold.description: Consolidation prunes facts whose retention score is below this. 0 = disabled. Retrieval-affecting — enable deliberately.

purge_horizon_days.title: Purge horizon (days)
purge_horizon_days.description: Hard-delete (and VACUUM) facts that have been archived longer than this many days. 0 = disabled (archives are kept, reversible).

bus.title: Work-queue backend
bus.description: Durable queue for detached capture/recovery. inproc = zero-dependency SQLite queue (default); nats = NATS JetStream (opt-in). Fails open to inproc if NATS is unavailable.

bus_max_deliver.title: Queue max deliveries
bus_max_deliver.description: Delivery attempts before a work item is dead-lettered.

bus_backoff.title: Queue retry backoff
bus_backoff.description: Retry backoff schedule in seconds, comma-separated (e.g. 5,30,120,600).

lease_ttl.title: Queue lease TTL (seconds)
lease_ttl.description: Seconds a claimed work item is leased before it can be reclaimed (crash recovery).

nats_url.title: NATS URL
nats_url.description: NATS server URL when bus=nats. Use a dedicated port so ltm doesn't share another project's server.

nats_stream.title: NATS stream name
nats_stream.description: JetStream stream name for the work queue.

nats_provision.title: NATS auto-provision
nats_provision.description: How to start NATS when bus=nats and none is reachable: binary = download + run nats-server (no Docker needed); docker = run the official image; off = bring your own.

nats_version.title: NATS server version
nats_version.description: Pinned nats-server version for the binary provisioner (checksum-verified download).
